arts.ttl: Team News: Middlesbrough vs. Leeds, Derby vs. Burnley, Sheffield United vs. Millwall: Tuesday's Championship team news in full
arts.sum: Sports Mole brings you Tuesday's Championship team news in full, including for Derby County vs. Burnley and Middlesbrough vs. Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Millwall legends help with podcast fundraiser for Cancer Research UK
arts.sum: The current squad also signed some and these can be purchased at Chat with Chaps CRUK Charity T Shirts – Nolu Clothing with all profits going to Cancer Research. Millwall legends Neil Harris, Lee Gregory and Steve Morison have signed t-shirts for a Millwall podcast on a fundraising drive to help battle cancer.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder Issues Rallying Cry Ahead of Sheffield United vs Millwall Clash
arts.sum: Sheffield United manager Chris Wilder has urged fans to get behind the team as the Blades prepare to face Millwall in a must-win Championship fixture at Bramall Lane. Following a shock 1-0 defeat away to Oxford United – their first road loss since New Year’s Day – the Blades missed the chance to pull four […] The post Chris Wilder Issues Rallying Cry Ahead of Sheffield United vs Millwall Clash appeared first on Sheff United Way.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United boss hits out ahead of Championship crunch game against Millwall
arts.sum: “I think it (the reaction of some of the fanbase at Oxford) is an absolute disgrace to the players that represent the football club and what they’ve done this season. If that’s what you think of the players then when we have the good days don’t be clapping – go home.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder slams Sheffield United response amid Leeds United promotion race 'an absolute joke'
arts.sum: "An absolute disgrace to the players representing the football club and what they've done this season. I think it's an absolute disgrace," Wilder said when asked about their reception from their supporters.

After Sheffield United fell to a shocking defeat at Oxford last Saturday, they will welcome Millwall to Bramall Lane in hopes of getting back on track. The Blades missed a mega opportunity to move four points clear of third-place Leeds United last weekend; they failed to make a dent in Oxford’s defence as Gary Rowett’s […] The post Sheffield United vs Millwall – Preview appeared first on Sheff United Way.

arts.ttl: Millwall boss Alex Neil quizzed on if Millwall can make a late play-off push
arts.sum: Alex Neil has said that it is still too early to say whether a Millwall playoff push is realistic, despite having just six games remaining in the Championship season. “We will try and win the next game, if it puts us closer to the play-offs then obviously it is realistic.

arts.ttl: Millwall boss says trend of late winners “not a coincidence” in wake of Portsmouth win
arts.sum: All of Millwall’s last four winning goals have come after the 80th minute, through Josh Coburn’s 95th minute winner against Derby and 81st minute winner at Watford, and Ivanovic’s 94th minute penalty against Stoke, accompanying his decisive goal against Portsmouth on Saturday. Alex Neil says he does not feel Millwall’s pattern of late winners is down to coincidence after their 2-1 victory over Portsmouth on Saturday, in which Mihailo Ivanovic’s 87th-minute header made the difference.
